message.content:
@startuml
title Mengubah SubMenu
actor Administrator
participant "Dashboard_V" as Dashboard_V
participant "Submenu_V" as Submenu_V
participant "EditSubmenu_V" as EditSubmenu_V
control "Admin_C" as Admin_C
control "Menu_C" as Menu_C
entity "Submenu_E" as Submenu_E

Admin_C -> Dashboard_V: 1 load->view()
Dashboard_V --> Administrator: 2 Halaman Dashboard
Administrator -> Dashboard_V: 3 klik menu Submenu management
Dashboard_V -> Menu_C: 4 Submenu()
Menu_C -> Submenu_E: 5
Submenu_E --> Menu_C: 6
Menu_C -> Submenu_V: 7 load->view()
Submenu_V --> Administrator: 8 Halaman Submenu management
Administrator -> Submenu_V: 9 klik tombol EditSubmenu
Submenu_V -> Menu_C: 10 EditSubmenu()
Menu_C -> EditSubmenu_V: 11 load->view()
EditSubmenu_V --> Administrator: 12 Halaman EditSubmenu
Administrator -> EditSubmenu_V: 13 Mengisi Inputan dan klik tombol edit
note right of Administrator: Inputan Submenu
EditSubmenu_V -> Menu_C: 14 EditSubmenu()
Menu_C -> Submenu_E: 15
alt [isValid() case]
    Submenu_E --> Menu_C: 16 isValid()
    Menu_C -> Submenu_V: 17 load->view()
    Submenu_V --> Administrator: 18 Halaman Submenu
else [isInvalid() case]
    Submenu_E --> Menu_C: 19 isInvalid()
    Menu_C -> EditSubmenu_V: 20 load->view()
    EditSubmenu_V --> Administrator: 21 Halaman Edit Submenu
end
@enduml
